target_0.title: Heart Lion
target_0.desc: A mystical lion representing love and bravery. Its glowing heart-shaped patterns symbolize warmth, compassion, and emotional strength.

target_1.title: Lion
target_1.desc: A powerful magical lion with a radiant mane inspired by the sun. It stands for courage, leadership, and protection.

target_2.title: Heart
target_2.desc: A magical heart symbol that represents love, kindness, and human connection. Its glowing energy spreads warmth and hope.

target_3.title: Deer
target_3.desc: A graceful mystical deer symbolizing peace, harmony, and a deep connection with nature. It moves silently through enchanted forests.

target_4.title: Leaf
target_4.desc: A magical leaf infused with the spirit of nature. It represents growth, renewal, and the balance of life.
